nodes.label: MIDI In
nodes.description: MIDI events forwarded to handleHiseEvent() callback

nodes.label: SNEX Code
nodes.description: User-written SNEX class selected via ClassId property. JIT compiled to native code.

nodes.label: SNEX Process
nodes.description: Delegates to JIT-compiled process()/processFrame() callbacks defined in SNEX code.

nodes.label: User Parameters
nodes.description:
Dynamic parameters defined by the SNEX code via setParameter

(). Up to 16.

nodes.label: Modulation Out
nodes.description: Optional normalised modulation output (0-1) if handleModulation() is defined in SNEX code.
